page_metadata.biotools__summary: SVRare is a tool for discovering disease-causing structural variants in the 100K Genomes Project. Right now SVRare is adapted to be used in the Genomics England (GEL) research environment.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: SVRare is a tool for discovering disease-causing structural variants in the 100K Genomes Project. Right now SVRare is adapted to be used in the Genomics England (GEL) research environment.
